active_playbooks.title: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
diagnosis: If CPM & CTR stable but CPL up = CVR issue (form/audience)
actions: Simplify lead form (2-3 qualifying questions max)
Review targeting: too broad -> irrelevant clicks -> CPL up
Add price or location in creative to deter low-intent leads
Retest audience signal (add Advantage+ signals: city, income)
Refresh creatives with clear value prop ('2 & 3 BHK from ₹99.39L')
If CPL up + quality stable -> improve hook or reallocate to best ads

active_playbooks.title: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
diagnosis: If CPM & CTR stable but CPL up = CVR issue (form/audience)
actions: Simplify lead form (2-3 qualifying questions max)
Review targeting: too broad -> irrelevant clicks -> CPL up
Add price or location in creative to deter low-intent leads
Retest audience signal (add Advantage+ signals: city, income)
Refresh creatives with clear value prop ('2 & 3 BHK from ₹99.39L')
If CPL up + quality stable -> improve hook or reallocate to best ads

active_playbooks.title: Thumb Stop Recovery — First 3 Seconds Fix
diagnosis: Check video size/aspect ratio mismatch (cropped on feed?)
Compare thumb-stop by audience and placement
actions: Add motion within first 1 second (pan, zoom, text slide-in)
Use face or eyes (human presence increases scroll-stops)
Add headline overlays on first frame ('3BHK | ₹1.35Cr | Ready 2025')
Use pattern interrupts (camera shakes, cuts, quick zooms)
Test UGC hooks ('POV: You finally find a 3BHK with 3 balconies')
Try native feel (looks like a reel, not an ad)

active_playbooks.title: Ad Fatigue Combat — Creative Rotation & Audience Expansion
actions: Refresh creatives every 30-45 days
Duplicate ad set with same creative to reset learning (if needed)
Test new ad formats (carousel, video, static alternates)
Expand audience slightly (add nearby pin codes, similar interests)
Replace high-frequency users (>8) with exclusion audience

patterns.detail: Top 4 ads: avg CPL ₹493, CTR 0.56%, CPM ₹712, Freq 1.11
Bottom 4 ads: avg CPL ₹2602, CTR 0.55%, CPM ₹356, Freq 1.27
Bottom performers cost 5.3x more per lead (₹2602 vs ₹493).
'Static' format appears more in bottom performers (2/4) than top (0/4).
'Video' format appears more in top performers (3/4) than bottom (0/4).
'Reel' format appears more in top performers (1/4) than bottom (0/4).
'Price-focused' format appears more in bottom performers (1/4) than top (0/4).
Top performers: 75% video, 25% static. Bottom: 100% video, 0% static.
Top video TSR: 9.0% vs bottom: 6.4%. Top video VHR: 41.2% vs bottom: 55.4%. Strong hooks = lower CPL.
Higher-spend ads show higher CPL (₹1514) vs lower-spend (₹1021). Possible audience ceiling at higher budgets.
High-CTR ads (>0.7%) have 31% lower CPL (₹1038 vs ₹1496). Investing in CTR improvement directly reduces CPL.

recommendations.category: CPL Cost Spiral — Form, Audience & Creative Triage
recommendations.detail: CPL ₹3380 > ₹936 alert (target ₹720 × 1.3). 2 possible root causes identified.

root_causes.solution: Refresh creatives: new hooks, colors, UGC-style variants. Swap first 3 seconds of videos.

root_causes.evidence: Verify optimization is set to 'Leads', not 'Form Opens' or 'View Content'

intellect_insights.detail: CPL rising from ₹702 to ₹827 despite continued spend. Audience ceiling likely reached. Consider: duplicate with fresh audience, or shift budget to campaigns with lower marginal CPL.
